assertions.text: domain-error-base-class: DomainError extends Error and sets this.name
assertions.evidence: DomainError extends Error, sets this.name = this.constructor.name, captures V8 stack trace

assertions.text: three-standard-subtypes: NotFoundError, ConflictError, ValidationError all extend DomainError
assertions.evidence: All three subtypes present in errors.ts, each extending DomainError with no additional boilerplate

assertions.text: entity-throws-typed-errors: order.ts throws DomainError subtypes, not plain new Error()
assertions.evidence: create() throws ValidationError for missing customerId, empty items, invalid item fields; cancel() throws ConflictError when already cancelled

assertions.text: http-error-handler-exists: 4-argument Express error middleware in adapters/inbound/http/express/
assertions.evidence: error-handler.ts exports a 4-arg function (err, req, res, next) registered in bootstrap.ts after all routes
instanceof checks in specificity order: ValidationError→400, NotFoundError→404, ConflictError→409, catch-all DomainError→422

assertions.text: domain-errors-warn-infra-errors-error: DomainError logged as console.warn, unknown as console.error
assertions.evidence: DomainError branches use console.warn(err.message); unknown errors use console.error(err) before returning 500
Final else branch returns 500 with 'Internal server error' after console.error
